name: Stoke Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Stoke Therapeutics is a late-stage clinical company developing RNA-based medicines to upregulate protein expression for severe genetic diseases, with lead candidate zorevunersen for Dravet syndrome and STK-002 for autosomal dominant optic atrophy (ADOA).

exposures.sentence: We are a late-stage clinical company dedicated to addressing the underlying causes of severe diseases by upregulating protein expression with RNA-based medicines.

catalysts.event: Initiation of global Phase 3 study EMPEROR for zorevunersen
catalysts.sentence: Following discussions with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration ( FDA ), European Medicines Agency ( EMA ), and Japan s Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Agency ( PMDA ), a global Phase 3 study, EMPEROR, was initiated in May 2025, with the first patient dosed in August 2025.

catalysts.event: First patient dosed in Phase 3 study EMPEROR
catalysts.sentence: Following discussions with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration ( FDA ), European Medicines Agency ( EMA ), and Japan s Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Agency ( PMDA ), a global Phase 3 study, EMPEROR, was initiated in May 2025, with the first patient dosed in August 2025.

catalysts.event: First patient dosed in OSPREY Phase 1 study for STK-002
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we dosed the first patient with STK-002 in the OSPREY Phase 1 study for the treatment of ADOA.
